disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Constant nausea with a vague, non-focal crampy lower-abdominal ache for about 48 hours, not relieved by over-the-counter antacids
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the stomach symptoms.
How long has the belly pain been going on and does anything help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a constant sick, queasy feeling with a dull crampy ache all over my belly. It's been going for about two days and the antacids did nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The abdominal pain is diffuse rather than localised, with no reported sharp or one-spot pain
trigger_question_examples: Can you point to where it hurts most, or is it all over?
Is the pain sharp and in one place, or spread out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's not really one spot — it's a dull ache spread across my whole belly, not a sharp stabbing pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting, no diarrhoea, no blood in vomit or stool, and no fever reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited at all, or seen any blood?
Any diarrhoea or fevers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't actually thrown up and there's no blood. No runs either, and I don't think I've had a fever.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe tension-type headaches described as a tight band around the head
trigger_question_examples: Any other symptoms alongside the stomach trouble?
How are your head and sleep?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I keep getting these tight band headaches around my head.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic exhaustion not relieved by ordinary rest, with poor sleep, present for months
trigger_question_examples: How have your energy and sleep been?
Does rest help the tiredness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm exhausted all the time and sleeping doesn't fix it. I can't switch off at night and I'm just running on empty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pervasive emotional numbness, low mood and hopelessness; feels detached and that nothing matters
trigger_question_examples: How has your mood been in yourself?
You mentioned not caring about anything — can you tell me more?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just feel numb and flat. I don't really care about anything anymore and I can't see anything changing for the better.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On sensitive direct questioning, denies current thoughts of harming self or of being better off dead, but describes a persistent sense that nothing matters
trigger_question_examples: When people feel this flat and hopeless, they sometimes have thoughts that life isn't worth living or of harming themselves — have you had any thoughts like that?
Have you had any thoughts of not wanting to be here?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No... I haven't thought about hurting myself. I just feel like nothing matters right now.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to get into all that — I just want my stomach sorted.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Irritability directed at people around them; spouse reports the patient snapping at co-workers and allies
trigger_question_examples: How have you been getting on with people around you?
Has your temper or patience changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been really short with everyone — snapping at people I work with over nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Works in high-stakes community advocacy and feels drained and worn out by the work, with guilt about taking time off and avoidance of news and advocacy content
trigger_question_examples: What's going on in your life and work at the moment?
You mentioned feeling drained by work — can you tell me about that?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My work is full-on advocacy stuff and it's completely wrung me out. I feel guilty even taking time off, and I can't face the news anymore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sharp, sudden or unbearable abdominal pain, no rigid board-like abdomen, and able to keep fluids down so far
trigger_question_examples: Has the pain ever become sudden, sharp or unbearable?
Can you still keep water and fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hasn't gone sharp or unbearable — it's more of a constant dull ache. I can still sip water, I just don't feel like eating.
